dailyNews.title: Qatar says ‘ready to help’ with US-Iran negotiations
dailyNews.description: Qatari Foreign Ministry spokesperson Majed al-Ansari says Qatar is “ready to help” with US-Iran negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Iran war fallout: JetBlue Airways increases check-in bag fees as fuel prices go up - How other airlines are responding
dailyNews.description: The check-in baggage prices have been increased at least $4. During non-peak hours, JetBlue will charge $39 for the first bag on domestic, Caribbean, and Latin America routes. The price was earlier $35.

dailyNews.title: Strikes To Begin Tomorrow: Iran Warns Tech Firms Over US' Killing Of Leaders
dailyNews.description: The Guards said that they would target leading US technology firms, listing the names of 18 companies it alleged were complicit in the "targeted assassination" of officials.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi accuses Congress of “spreading panic and fear” during global crises

dailyNews.description: The chief of global football's governing body says US-Israeli war on Iran will not affect scheduling of  2026 World Cup.

dailyNews.title: US Supreme Court rejects Colorado's ban on LGBT ‘conversion talk’ therapy
dailyNews.description: The US Supreme Court on Tuesday (local time) rejected a Colorado law that prohibited psychotherapists from using ‘conversion’ talk therapy, aimed at changing a Lesbian Gay Bisexual Transgender (LGBT) minor's sexual orientation or identity, Reuters reported.

dailyNews.title: Don’t forgive Congress that treated Assam in step-motherly manner: Rajnath
dailyNews.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh accused Congress of neglecting Assam and urged voters to reject them in the April 9 election, highlighting BJP's development efforts.

dailyNews.title: Jon Stewart mocks Donald Trump’s conduct, calls him ‘grandpa who’s lost his filter in public’
dailyNews.description: The Daily Show host Jon Stewart has criticised US President Donald Trump’s recent public conduct, comparing it to an unfiltered elderly relative rather than a wartime leader. His remarks come amid scrutiny of Trump’s messaging and leadership during an ongoing crisis.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day on positive thinking by Norman Vincent Peale: ‘Change your thoughts and you change your world’
dailyNews.description: This quote is personal. It tells us that we may not be able to control everything that happens around us, but we can control how we think about it. That is where it all starts.

dailyNews.description: Despite political tensions between the US and UK, the King will travel to Washington next month.

topStories.description: Nancy Pelosi declined to say whether Democrats would pursue impeaching Trump if they regain power, saying the decision is up to a new Congress to make.

topStories.description: Gas prices topping $4 per gallon, driven by the Iran war, are another broken promise by Trump, Rep. Suzan DelBene claims, as Democrats target GOP on costs.

dailyNews.title: Trump Lashes Out at Europe Over Strait of Hormuz, Tells U.K. to ‘Go Get Your Own Oil’
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s latest outbursts followed reports that European countries were imposing more restrictions on American aircraft in their airspace.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Gas Prices Hit $4 a Gallon on Average, a ‘Headache’ for Drivers and Trump
dailyNews.description: A month since the first U.S.-Israeli attacks and Iran’s response effectively shut off Persian Gulf oil, drivers are paying significantly more to fill up.

dailyNews.title: Will $4 Gas Hurt Trump’s Approval Ratings? Here’s What History Shows.
dailyNews.description: Presidents since at least the Carter administration have seen their approval ratings tied to gas prices. But there are signs the correlation may be weakening.

dailyNews.title: For Trump, the Artemis II Moon Mission Offers a Shot to Cement His Legacy
dailyNews.description: No president since the Apollo era has pushed harder to return to the moon than President Trump. But he wants a space achievement that is about “more than getting rocks this time.”

dailyNews.title: Trump doubles down on harsh words about U.S. allies over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump told CBS News' Weijia Jiang on Tuesday that the U.S. isn't withdrawing "quite yet" from the war with Iran, and urged U.S. allies to be more helpful with reopening the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Natalie Brand has more.

dailyNews.title: Gas price rises as Trump mulls dropping bid to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump indicates he could abandon efforts to force Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz as the war pushes U.S. gas prices over the $4 mark.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth backs Trump's criticism of U.S. allies over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said that the upcoming days of the Iran war "will be decisive," and reiterated President Trump's criticism of U.S. allies for not helping at the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Eleanor Watson has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Trump thinks Strait will 'automatically open' when US leaves
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
